description: Crafted from pure leather with a grosgrain fabric lining along the small pockets, this three-fold wallet from Newhide is a great addition to your everyday wardrobe. The soft natural leather removes bulk, making this a slim, sleek wallet for occasions when only the best will do. Leather for flexibility and suppleness Two main compartments, with one compartment having a zipper closure Multiple partitions to stash away cards and coins Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
